name: cc-orchestrator
description: Transparent Claude Code delegation for Codex with task-chain sessions, audit records, and mandatory Codex verification.

interface.shortDescription: Transparent Claude Code workers for Codex
interface.longDescription: Let Codex delegate bounded leaf tasks to Claude Code with visible receipts, task-chain session continuity, durable audit records, and a required Codex verification handoff.
